question:
Over $1.2B committed to the MegaETH public sale?

Description: This market will resolve to “Yes” if total commitments for the MegaETH raise on Sonar exceeds $1.2B before the raise closes. Otherwise, it will resolve to “No.”

The resolution source is the official raise page available at https://token.megaeth.com/

If the final commitment amount cannot be verified by December 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET, or if relevant information becomes permanently unavailable within the market timeframe, this market will resolve to “No.”

evidences.title: MegaETH Public Sale Coming Soon, What Will the ...
evidences.content: As mentioned earlier, MegaETH's valuations for the $20 million seed round financing in June 2024 and $10 million Echo round financing in December 2024 were both in the nine-figure range. And in the first stage NFT issuance in February of this year, according to a screenshot published by Adam Hollander, Chief Marketing Officer of OpenSea at the time, MegaETH raised 4964 ETH in the first stage NFT issuance, worth $13.29 million at the time. By my calculation, this $13.29 million represents at least 2.5% of the token distribution authority, and it can be calculated that based on the NFT fundraising situation, MegaETH's FDV at that time was around $540 million. ## Polymarket Market Prediction: 86% Probability of Impacting $2 Billion FDV [...] Now, this project, backed by Vitalik Buterin, is about to kick off its public sale on the Sonar platform. Is this a rare entry opportunity for ordinary investors, or is it the final blow of accumulated risk? This article will dissect the funding context, valuation logic, core value, and potential risks. # MegaETH Funding Journey: From VC, Vitalik Endorsement to Community Building As an Ethereum L2 project committed to achieving "real-time block...
